title: kill: fix output
body:
Make sure that `kill -a` is printing the IDs of killed containers.
Previously, it was only printing empty lines.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL

Good catch! Works as advertised, LGTM.
Big sigh ... search test fart again.  I'll take a look
search flake is so common that it doesn't even merit filing an issue. It's a temporary outage (so far), and beyond our control. All we can do is wait.

LGTM
once the tests get happy
rebased to fix the search flake :heavy_check_mark:
